pageContext.name: The Dark Knight Returns
pageContext.description: It begins here, an army — to bring sense to a world plagued by worse than thieves and murderers.   Sideshow Art Prints presents The Dark Knight Returns Fine Art Print, a dramatic DC Comics art print by artist Dave Wilkins after Frank Miller.  Drawing inspiration from the iconic cover of Batman: The Dark Knight Returns, artist Dave Wilkins captures Bruce Wayne's descent on a lawless Gotham. In the absence of its Caped Crusader, the city has fallen to ruin beneath villains and gangs running unchecked. This moody composition features familiar faces of both friends and foes as Batman returns to the unending fight, illuminated by a single bolt of lightning. Two-Face, Robin (Carrie Kelley), Commissioner Gordon, Green Arrow, the Mutant Leader, The Joker, and Superman can be seen as symbols of the reasons both good and bad that inspire the Dark Knight to stand against crime once again.  Each The Dark Knight Returns Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 400 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this Batman wall art is a must-have for fans looking to pay tribute to a celebrated DC Comics story.  Let's ride — bring justice back to Gotham and add The Dark Knight Returns Fine Art Print by Dave Wilkins to your collection today.
